parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: unique identifier of the project CMP

parameters.name: vpcId
parameters.description: unique identifier of the vpc in which the subnet has been created

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: unique identifier of the subnet to delete

parameters.name: newDefaultSubnet
parameters.description: if a default subnet is going to be deleted, it's the uri of the subnet to set as default for the vpc to replace the deleting one
